settings.name: currency
settings.label: Fallback currency
settings.description: Fallback currency when the Amazon page does not expose one.

settings.name: timeoutSeconds
settings.label: HTTP timeout (seconds)
settings.description: Request timeout used when fetching Amazon product pages.

settings.name: defaultDomain
settings.label: Default Amazon domain
settings.description: Domain used when only an ASIN is provided (for example www.amazon.nl).
